positive: A highly stylized, minimalist woodland scene silhouette. The composition features a central grouping of diverse deciduous trees, subtle underbrush, and sweeping mountain range outlines in the background. Use a deep indigo and muted sage color palette, providing strong contrast against a clean, creamy off-white background. The art style should evoke a clean, etched botanical print combined with modern, geometric graphic design elements. Ideal for a seamless apparel print, featuring clean lines, visible negative space, and perfect symmetry when tiled. Studio lighting, vector art aesthetic, ultra-detail.
